title: December Daily Days - 2-6
excerpt: Played a little catch up with my December Daily. All the photos in the album are taken with my iPhone and these photos are as well. Didn't get a chance to edit them either, but hopefully you'll get the idea.…
body:
Played a little catch up with my December Daily. All the photos in the album are taken with my iPhone and these photos are as well. Didn't get a chance to edit them either, but hopefully you'll get the idea. Time seems even more precious and scarce these days! Thank goodness for this simple way of memory keeping where everything just slips right into the pockets. All of these photos were printed on the Canon SELPHY CP900 Wireless Printer, which I love. And I haven't had any issues with it. Love that I can get 2 photos onto 1 sheet by using PicFrame. I print wirelessly while doing other things like feeding Jack. This multitasking mama is realizing it's easier to focus on one thing at a time when it comes to the little one, but this happens to be an exception.

I attached a 3x4 card from my Cut & Paste Project Life kit to a 4x6 one for journaling. The "seriously" is a custom Kal Barteski acrylic design that is exclusive to the Project Life class I taught in Hawaii. I have several class kits left, and if you're interested in purchasing the entire kit for $60 including shipping (US only), send me an email with your Paypal address. There are a TON of items in each kit.

The Whoa Baby and the numbers stamps are by Mama Elephant, one of our new creative partners. I stamped it using Ocean, one of their new ink pads.

Other supplies include: Studio Calico December Daily kit | Kelly Purkey washi tapes | Cut & Paste phrase stickers | Cut & Paste Chipboard Thickers | Camera stitched using this stencil kit | Airplane punch | Photos with text from the app, A Beautiful Mess December Daily 2013 Cover Day 1

How's your December Daily progress going?
